org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.springretry.SpringRetryConfigBuilder

Packages that use SpringRetryConfigBuilder
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.springretry
Spring Cloud Circuit Breaker Spring Retry support.

  • Uses of SpringRetryConfigBuilder in org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.springretry

    Subclasses with type arguments of type SpringRetryConfigBuilder in org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.springretry
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SpringRetryCircuitBreakerFactory
    Deprecated.
    in favor of the CircuitBreakerFactory implementation in spring-cloud-circuitbreaker-framework-retry
    Methods in org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.springretry that return SpringRetryConfigBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder.backOffPolicy(org.springframework.retry.backoff.BackOffPolicy backOffPolicy)
    Sets the backoff policy when retrying a failed request.
    protected SpringRetryConfigBuilder
    SpringRetryCircuitBreakerFactory.configBuilder(String id)
    Deprecated.
     
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder.forceRefreshState(boolean refresh)
    Forces a refresh on the DefaultRetryState object.
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder.retryPolicy(org.springframework.retry.policy.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy retryPolicy)
    Sets the CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy to use.
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder.retryPolicy(org.springframework.retry.RetryPolicy retryPolicy)
    Sets the RetryPolicy to use.
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder.stateClassifier(org.springframework.classify.Classifier<Throwable, Boolean> classifier)
    The Classifier used by the DefaultRetryState object.
